description: Submit AI inference to XFuel, pay per task (USDC via x402 or TFUEL), fetch/verify ZK proofs.
name: io.github.XFuel-Lab/xfuel-mcp

environmentVariables.description: XFuel API base URL. Defaults to the hosted testnet demo.
environmentVariables.name: XFUEL_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: API key sent as X-API-Key. Defaults to the shared public demo key.
environmentVariables.name: XFUEL_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer token required on the HTTP transport (Authorization: Bearer <token>).
environmentVariables.name: XFUEL_MCP_AUTH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Theta RPC URL enabling verify_proof's optional on-chain nullifier read.
environmentVariables.name: XFUEL_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Funded payer private key that enables the pay_with_usdc tool. Moves USDC — keep secret; use a low-balance wallet.
environmentVariables.name: XFUEL_PAYER_PRIVATE_KEY

title: XFuel
